title: Eltroplectris schlechteriana
taxonomy: Eltroplectris schlechteriana is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which encompasses approximately 30,000 species of orchids. This species belongs to the genus Eltroplectris, which is a small group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The Eltroplectris genus is further divided into several species, with Eltroplectris schlechteriana being one of them. Eltroplectris schlechteriana's classification is also aligned with the Angiosperm Phylogeny Group III (APG III) system, which groups plant species based on their evolutionary relationships. Eltroplectris schlechteriana's classification is an essential aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and ecological context.
